title: task
description: Zephyr only has ipv6_addr.c/h for address handling. Python has full ipv6/ module with icmpv6.py, packet.py, udp.py. Rust has icmpv6.rs, ipv6.rs, udp.rs in lichen-core. Zephyr needs ICMPv6 for neighbor discovery, ping, and error handling.
close_reason: Already implemented: icmpv6.c (526 lines), 21 tests, Kconfig integration
